questions.criteria: Identify the chemical reaction, observations, and balanced equation when copper powder is heated in air.
key_concepts_expected: Formation of black copper oxide (CuO)
Balanced chemical equation: 2Cu + O2 --Heat--> 2CuO

questions.criteria: Explain the physical properties of carbon compounds regarding melting/boiling points and electrical conductivity.
key_concepts_expected: Low melting and boiling points due to weak intermolecular forces of attraction
Poor electrical conductivity due to covalent bonding and absence of free ions or charged particles

questions.criteria: Explain the physiological cause of muscle cramps during sudden physical activity.
key_concepts_expected: Anaerobic respiration pathway chosen due to a lack or insufficiency of oxygen
Accumulation/formation of lactic acid in muscle cells causing discomfort

questions.criteria: Differentiate between the asexual reproduction mechanisms of Plasmodium and Leishmania.
key_concepts_expected: Plasmodium reproduces via multiple fission within a protective cyst structure during unfavorable conditions
Leishmania reproduces via binary fission occurring longitudinally relative to its flagellar structure

questions.criteria: Explain why a paper starts burning when sunlight is focused using a convex lens.
key_concepts_expected: Convex lens acts as a converging lens that refracts parallel rays of sunlight
Concentration of light rays at a single focal point produces localized thermal energy/heat

questions.criteria: Identify the optical term given to the bright sharp spot formed on the paper.
key_concepts_expected: The bright spot represents the Principal Focus of the lens
It constitutes a real, highly diminished image of the sun

questions.criteria: Calculate the time taken for a charge of 500 C to pass through a circuit with a current of 25 mA.
mathematical_steps_expected: Correct current unit conversion: 25 mA = 25/1000 A = 0.025 A
Use of fundamental electric current formula: I = Q / t rearranged to t = Q / I
Substitution and base calculation: t = 500 / 0.025 = 20,000 seconds
Accurate time conversion layout: 20,000 s = 333 minutes and 20 seconds

questions.criteria: Analyze the chemical reaction when iron nails are placed in a copper sulphate solution.
key_concepts_expected: Balanced equation: Fe(s) + CuSO4(aq) -> FeSO4(aq) + Cu(s)
Classification of the process as a displacement reaction where a more reactive metal displaces a less reactive one
Identification of alternative high-reactivity elements such as Zinc (Zn) or Aluminium (Al)

questions.criteria: Explain the extraction process of mercury from its natural sulphide ore.
key_concepts_expected: Identification of the native mineral ore as Cinnabar (HgS)
Roasting step equation: 2HgS + 3O2 --Heat--> 2HgO + 2SO2
Thermal reduction equation: 2HgO --Heat--> 2Hg + O2 in the presence of thermal energy

questions.criteria: State the source organ and physiological functions of growth hormone and thyroxine.
key_concepts_expected: Growth hormone is secreted by the pituitary gland and governs skeletal and muscle growth layout
Thyroxine is secreted by the thyroid gland and regulates carbohydrate, protein, and fat metabolic rates

questions.criteria: Analyze a monohybrid cross experiment involving tall and short pea plants across F1 and F2 generations.
key_concepts_expected: F1 progeny exhibits uniform tall phenotypes with a heterozygous (Tt) genotype layout
Shortness trait expression is suppressed in F1 because it is controlled by a recessive allele
F2 phenotypic generation ratio shows a strict 3:1 pattern (Tall:Short)
Conclusion that traits are determined by two copies of a gene, demonstrating dominant and recessive behaviors

questions.criteria: Define dispersion of white light through a glass prism and explain its physical basis.
key_concepts_expected: Definition of dispersion as the splitting of white light into its constituent VIBGYOR colors
Refractive index of the medium varies inversely with the wavelength of light causing components to bend at different angles
Requirement of a labeled geometric ray diagram detailing the incident ray, refraction boundaries, and emergent band layout

questions.criteria: Describe the formation, structure, and internal field of an electromagnet using a solenoid setup.
key_concepts_expected: Placing a soft iron core inside a current-carrying solenoid magnetizes it to form an electromagnet
The internal magnetic field inside a solenoid consists of straight, parallel lines indicating a uniform field structure

questions.criteria: Differentiate between a food chain and a food web, and analyze trophic level population disturbances.
key_concepts_expected: Food chain represents a single linear series of linear energy flow, whereas a food web shows complex interconnected networks of food chains
If a secondary consumer (deer) population drops, tertiary consumers (tigers) decrease due to starvation, while primary producers increase drastically due to reduced grazing pressure

questions.criteria: Explain water of crystallization using Ferrous Sulphate and Gypsum chemical transitions.
key_concepts_expected: Definition of water of crystallization as a fixed number of water molecules chemically bound in a formula unit
Thermal degradation of green crystalline ferrous sulphate: FeSO4.7H2O --Heat--> FeSO4 + 7H2O showing a color change to white
Controlled calcination of Gypsum at 100°C (373K) to yield Plaster of Paris: CaSO4.2H2O -> CaSO4.0.5H2O + 1.5H2O
Listing core practical applications of Plaster of Paris such as setting fractured bones or manufacturing decorative toys

questions.criteria: Analyze carbon dioxide volume variances during respiration experiments and identify stomatal structure parameters.
key_concepts_expected: Exhaled air turns lime water milky much faster than atmospheric air due to a significantly higher volumetric concentration of CO2: Ca(OH)2 + CO2 -> CaCO3 + H2O
Identification of primary microscopic leaf structures: (I) Guard cells regulating the stomatal pore, (II) Chloroplasts
Listing key functions of stomata including gaseous exchange (O2/CO2) and driving transpiration pull

questions.criteria: State Ohm's law and evaluate voltage and current distribution parameters across series circuits.
key_concepts_expected: Ohm's Law declaration: V = IR, establishing that current is directly proportional to voltage under constant temperature conditions
Deduction that if voltage drops to one-third, current drops proportionally to one-third
Series circuit processing calculation: Req = R1 + R2 + R3 = 5 + 10 + 15 = 30 Ohms
Total current calculation using Ohm's Law: I = V / Req = 6 / 30 = 0.2 A
Potential difference computation across individual resistors: V2 = I * R2 = 0.2 * 10 = 2 V

questions.criteria: Define hydrocarbons, explain carbon's bonding features, and outline basic organic chemical functional groups and esterification.
key_concepts_expected: Definition of hydrocarbons as organic compounds containing exclusively carbon and hydrogen atoms
Explanation of carbon's unique structural properties: Catenation (self-linking capability) and Tetravalency
Structural formula layouts for chemical functional groups: Aldehyde (-CHO) and Ketone (-CO-)
Esterification reaction equation: CH3COOH + C2H5OH --Conc. H2SO4--> CH3COOC2H5 + H2O

questions.criteria: Differentiate pollination methods, explain floral fertilization events, and identify anatomical seed layout functions.
key_concepts_expected: Self-pollination involves pollen transfer within the same flower/plant; cross-pollination involves transfer between separate flowers of the same species
Function of petals (corolla) in insect attraction and their post-fertilization shedding behavior
Identification of embryo anatomy layout functions: Plumule (future shoot), Radicle (future root), and Cotyledon (stored nutrient reserves for germination)

questions.criteria: Define spherical mirror geometric principles and formulate virtual image tracking paths using ray diagrams.
key_concepts_expected: Definition of the Principal Axis as a straight line passing normal through the pole and center of curvature of a spherical mirror
Radius of curvature calculation from focal length parameters: R = 2f = 2 * 10 cm = 20 cm
Construction of a geometric ray diagram mapping object tracking, divergence lines, and virtual image convergence positioning behind a convex mirror surface
